sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50988" key="i)/skai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἴσκαι</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶν</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n50988.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fungus growing on oaks and walnut-trees</tr_>, used as a cautery, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.91</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.49</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
